ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the tweet was created */,
  "full_text" TEXT /* Full text content of the tweet */,
  "retweeted_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retweeted status (if applicable) */,
  "quoted_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quoted status (if applicable) */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* ID of the place where the tweet was posted (if applicable) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source application used to post the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the tweet */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic or category of the tweet */,
  "entities" TEXT /* Entities mentioned in the tweet */,
  "truncated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet text is truncated */,
  "display_text_range" TEXT /* Range of the displayed text in the tweet */,
  "in_reply_to_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet this tweet is in reply to */,
  "in_reply_to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this tweet is in reply to */,
  "in_reply_to_screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user this tweet is in reply to */,
  "geo" TEXT /* Geographical location information (if available) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the tweet (if available) */,
  "contributors" TEXT /* Contributors to the tweet (if applicable) */,
  "is_quote_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is a quote status */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites */,
  "favorited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is favorited */,
  "retweeted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is retweeted */,
  "possibly_sensitive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tweet is possibly sensitive */,
  "lang" TEXT /* Language of the tweet */,
  "scopes" TEXT /* Scopes of the tweet (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_retweeted_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("retweeted_status_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_quoted_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("quoted_status_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Twitter username */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the user's website */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is verified */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "background_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's background image */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each place */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the place */,
  "bounding_box" TEXT /* Bounding box coordinates of the place */,
  "place_type" TEXT /* Type of place (e.g., city, country, continent) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source application */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retweets" (
  "retweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retweet */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who retweeted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the retweet was created */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, quote, favorite, mention, hashtag) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the interaction (e.g., 1 for a retweet, 0.5 for a favorite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_retweets_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who quoted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the quote was created */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, quote, favorite, mention, hashtag) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the interaction (e.g., 1 for a retweet, 0.5 for a favorite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorited tweet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the favorite was created */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, quote, favorite, mention, hashtag) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the interaction (e.g., 1 for a retweet, 0.5 for a favorite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the mention */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mention was created */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, quote, favorite, mention, hashtag) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the interaction (e.g., 1 for a retweet, 0.5 for a favorite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet containing the hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag used in the tweet */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hashtag was created */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, quote, favorite, mention, hashtag) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the interaction (e.g., 1 for a retweet, 0.5 for a favorite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of favorites */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate of the tweet */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., retweet, quote, favorite, mention, hashtag) */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score of the interaction (e.g., 1 for a retweet, 0.5 for a favorite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., user, hashtag, URL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "influencers" (
  "influencer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each influencer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is an influencer */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the influencer is associated with */,
  "influence_score" REAL /* Influence score of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("influencer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_influencers_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)
